Database available at 'jdbc:h2:file:./data/atlasdb' 2026-06-16 15:21:08.870 [main] INFO com.enterprise.atlas.workflow.service.WorkflowServiceTest.logStarted [StartupInfoLogger.java:56] - Started WorkflowServiceTest in 0.814 seconds (process running for 28.561) Hibernate: select wi1_0.workflow_instance_pk, wi1_0.business_key, wi1_0.created_at, wi1_0.current_node_id, wi1_0.runtime_graph, wi1_0.serialized_context, wi1_0.status, wi1_0.updated_at, wi1_0.version_number, wi1_0.workflow_key, wi1_0.version_id from workflow_instances wi1_0 where wi1_0.status=? order by wi1_0.created_at desc Hibernate: select wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk from workflow_definitions wd1_0 where wd1_0.wf_key=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select el1_0.execution_log_pk, el1_0.completed_at, el1_0.context_id, el1_0.error_message, el1_0.execution_trace_json, el1_0.input_context_json, el1_0.outcome_bucket_id, el1_0.outcome_node_id, el1_0.outcome_node_label, el1_0.started_at, el1_0.status, el1_0.total_duration_ms, el1_0.version_number, el1_0.instance_id, el1_0.workflow_key, el1_0.version_id from execution_logs el1_0 where el1_0.instance_id=? and el1_0.status=? Hibernate: select wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk, wd1_0.active_version, wd1_0.created_at, wd1_0.description, wd1_0.wf_key, wd1_0.name, wd1_0.updated_at, v1_0.workflow_definition_id, v1_0.workflow_version_pk, v1_0.created_at, v1_0.created_by, v1_0.definition_json, v1_0.status, v1_0.updated_at, v1_0.updated_by, v1_0.version from workflow_definitions wd1_0 left join workflow_versions v1_0 on wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk=v1_0.workflow_definition_id where wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk=? order by v1_0.version Hibernate: select rs1_0.revert_status_pk, rs1_0.bucket_id, rs1_0.bucket_name, rs1_0.completed_at, rs1_0.created_at, rs1_0.form_id, rs1_0.dependency_bucket_ids, rs1_0.previous_step_id, rs1_0.resolution_notes, rs1_0.resolved_by, rs1_0.status, rs1_0.workflow_instance_id from revert_status rs1_0 where rs1_0.workflow_instance_id=? order by rs1_0.created_at desc Hibernate: select cf1_0.customer_form_pk, cf1_0.customer_name, cf1_0.form_status, cf1_0.updated_at from customer_forms cf1_0 where cf1_0.customer_form_pk=? Hibernate: insert into workflow_definitions (active_version, created_at, description, wf_key, name, updated_at, workflow_definition_pk) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select coalesce(max(wv1_0.version), 0) from workflow_versions wv1_0 where wv1_0.workflow_definition_id=? Hibernate: select wv1_0.workflow_version_pk, wv1_0.created_at, wv1_0.created_by, wv1_0.definition_json, wv1_0.status, wv1_0.updated_at, wv1_0.updated_by, wv1_0.version, wv1_0.workflow_definition_id from workflow_versions wv1_0 where wv1_0.workflow_version_pk=?

testcase.name: testUpdateDraftVersionAndImmutability
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk from workflow_definitions wd1_0 where wd1_0.wf_key=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk, wd1_0.active_version, wd1_0.created_at, wd1_0.description, wd1_0.wf_key, wd1_0.name, wd1_0.updated_at, v1_0.workflow_definition_id, v1_0.workflow_version_pk, v1_0.created_at, v1_0.created_by, v1_0.definition_json, v1_0.status, v1_0.updated_at, v1_0.updated_by, v1_0.version from workflow_definitions wd1_0 left join workflow_versions v1_0 on wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk=v1_0.workflow_definition_id where wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk=? order by v1_0.version Hibernate: insert into workflow_definitions (active_version, created_at, description, wf_key, name, updated_at, workflow_definition_pk) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select coalesce(max(wv1_0.version), 0) from workflow_versions wv1_0 where wv1_0.workflow_definition_id=? Hibernate: select wv1_0.workflow_version_pk, wv1_0.created_at, wv1_0.created_by, wv1_0.definition_json, wv1_0.status, wv1_0.updated_at, wv1_0.updated_by, wv1_0.version, wv1_0.workflow_definition_id from workflow_versions wv1_0 where wv1_0.workflow_version_pk=?

testcase.name: testGovernanceFlowTransitions
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk from workflow_definitions wd1_0 where wd1_0.wf_key=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk, wd1_0.active_version, wd1_0.created_at, wd1_0.description, wd1_0.wf_key, wd1_0.name, wd1_0.updated_at, v1_0.workflow_definition_id, v1_0.workflow_version_pk, v1_0.created_at, v1_0.created_by, v1_0.definition_json, v1_0.status, v1_0.updated_at, v1_0.updated_by, v1_0.version from workflow_definitions wd1_0 left join workflow_versions v1_0 on wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk=v1_0.workflow_definition_id where wd1_0.workflow_definition_pk=? order by v1_0.version Hibernate: insert into workflow_definitions (active_version, created_at, description, wf_key, name, updated_at, workflow_definition_pk) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select coalesce(max(wv1_0.version), 0) from workflow_versions wv1_0 where wv1_0.workflow_definition_id=? Hibernate: select wv1_0.workflow_version_pk, wv1_0.created_at, wv1_0.created_by, wv1_0.definition_json, wv1_0.status, wv1_0.updated_at, wv1_0.updated_by, wv1_0.version, wv1_0.workflow_definition_id from workflow_versions wv1_0 where wv1_0.workflow_version_pk=?
